---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new workflow, preset, validator, or doc improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What dbt or AI-agent workflow problem would this solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the behavior, command, preset, validator, or documentation you want.

## Who benefits?

- Analytics engineers
- Data platform leads
- dbt consultants
- AI-agent users
- Other:

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] The change is documented.
- [ ] The change has tests or an example, if it affects behavior.
- [ ] The change does not require a specific AI agent.
